Description: Manatee shall make autonomous decisions based off of context
Motivation: A rigourous control system allows the robot to reliably navigate its surroundings

Description: Manatee shall understand its position with respect to the world frame
Motivation: To provide the control system with context for its decisions

Description: Manatee shall have physical joystick control
Motivation: To drive Manatee during research deployments and to expedite pool testing procedures

Description: Manatee's software shall be verifiable without uploading to the robot
Motivation: To allow code blocks to be tested and developed without putting Manatee out of commision.

Description: Manatee shall have an intuitive interface to communicate with users during wired testing
Motivation: It is important that users can access core metrics such as battery voltage and camera feeds with minimal training
